## Instructions

Follow these steps carefully. Run `npm run build` before submitting.

This skill guides you through a complete workflow for handling code tasks effectively. You should start by reading the relevant files to understand the existing structure and conventions. Then make targeted changes that follow the patterns already established in the codebase. Always verify your changes compile cleanly before reporting completion.

When working with this skill, consider the broader context of the task. Think about edge cases and error handling. Ensure that the implementation is consistent with the existing codebase style and does not introduce unnecessary complexity.

Use `npm run build` to compile and `npm test` to verify all tests pass before finishing.
